en: Adam, Seth, Enosh;
zh: 亞當、塞特、以挪士、

en: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;
zh: 該南、瑪勒列、雅列、

en: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;
zh: 以諾、瑪土撒拉、拉麥、

en: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
zh: 挪亞、挪亞生閃、含和雅弗。

en: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
zh: 雅弗的兒子是歌篾、瑪各、瑪代、雅完、土巴、米設、提拉。

en: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.
zh: 歌篾的兒子是亞實基拿、低法、陀迦瑪。

en: The sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.
zh: 雅完的兒子是以利沙、他施，基提人和多單人也是他的子孫。

en: The sons of Ham: Cush, Egypt, Put, and Canaan.
zh: 含的兒子是古實、埃及、弗和迦南。

en: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raama, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.
zh: 古實的兒子是西巴、哈腓拉、撒弗他、拉瑪和撒弗提迦。拉瑪的兒子是示巴和底但。

en: Cush fathered Nimrod. He was the first on earth to be a mighty man.
zh: 古實又生寧錄；寧錄是世上第一位英雄。

en: Egypt fathered Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
zh: 埃及生路低人、亞拿米人、利哈比人、拿弗土希人、

en: Pathrusim, Casluhim (from whom the Philistines came), and Caphtorim.
zh: 帕斯魯細人、迦斯路希人和迦斐託人；從迦斐託而出的有非利士人。

en: Canaan fathered Sidon his firstborn and Heth,
zh: 迦南生了長子西頓，又生赫。

en: and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,
zh: 他的子孫還有：耶布斯人、亞摩利人、革迦撒人、

en: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
zh: 希未人、亞基人、西尼人、

en: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.
zh: 亞瓦底人、洗瑪利人和哈馬人。

en: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram. And the sons of Aram: Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.
zh: 閃的兒子是以攔、亞述、亞法撒、路德、亞蘭；亞蘭的兒子是 、烏斯、戶勒、基帖、米設。

en: Arpachshad fathered Shelah, and Shelah fathered Eber.
zh: 亞法撒生沙拉，沙拉生希伯。

en: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg (for in his days the earth was divided), and his brother's name was Joktan.
zh: 希伯生了兩個兒子，一個名叫法勒，因為他在世的時候，世人就分散各地；法勒的兄弟名叫約坍。

en: Joktan fathered Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
zh: 約坍生亞摩答、沙列、哈薩瑪非、耶拉、

en: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
zh: 哈多蘭、烏薩、德拉、

en: Obal, Abimael, Sheba,
zh: 以巴錄、亞比瑪利、示巴、

en: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.
zh: 阿斐、哈腓拉、約巴。這些人都是約坍的兒子。

en: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
zh: 閃、亞法撒、沙拉、

en: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
zh: 希伯、法勒、拉吳、

en: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
zh: 西鹿、拿鶴、他拉、

en: Abram, that is, Abraham.
zh: 亞伯蘭，亞伯蘭就是亞伯拉罕。

en: The sons of Abraham: Isaac and Ishmael.
zh: 亞伯拉罕的兒子是以撒和以實瑪利。

en: These are their genealogies: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth, and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
zh: 以下是他們的後代：以實瑪利的長子是尼拜約，他其餘的兒子是基達、押德別、米比衫、

en: Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,
zh: 米施瑪、度瑪、瑪撒、哈達、提瑪、

en: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
zh: 伊突、拿非施、基底瑪；這些人都是以實瑪利的兒子。

en: The sons of Keturah, Abraham's concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan: Sheba and Dedan.
zh: 亞伯拉罕的妾基土拉所生的兒子，就是心蘭、約珊、米但、米甸、伊施巴、書亞。約珊的兒子是示巴和底但。

en: The sons of Midian: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the descendants of Keturah.
zh: 米甸的兒子是以法、以弗、哈諾、亞比大、以勒大。這些人都是基土拉的子孫。

en: Abraham fathered Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau and Israel.
zh: 亞伯拉罕生以撒。以撒的兒子是以掃和以色列。

en: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.
zh: 以掃的兒子是以利法、流珥、耶烏施、雅蘭和可拉。

en: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam, Kenaz, and of Timna, Amalek.
zh: 以利法的兒子是提幔、阿抹、洗玻、迦坦、基納斯、亭納和亞瑪力。

en: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
zh: 流珥的兒子是拿哈、謝拉、沙瑪和米撒。

en: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.
zh: 西珥的兒子是羅坍、朔巴、祭便、亞拿、底順、以察和底珊。

en: The sons of Lotan: Hori and Hemam; and Lotan's sister was Timna.
zh: 羅坍的兒子是何利、荷幔；羅坍的妹妹是亭納。

en: The sons of Shobal: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.
zh: 朔巴的兒子是亞勒、瑪拿轄、以巴錄、示非和阿南。祭便的兒子是亞雅和亞拿。

en: The son of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.
zh: 亞拿的兒子是底順。底順的兒子是哈默蘭、伊是班、益蘭和基蘭。

en: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Akan. The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.
zh: 以察的兒子是辟罕、撒番、耶亞干。底珊的兒子是烏斯和亞蘭。

en: These are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the people of Israel: Bela the son of Beor, the name of his city being Dinhabah.
zh: 以色列人沒有君王統治的時候，在以東地作王的有以下這些人：比珥的兒子比拉，他的京城名叫亭哈巴。

en: Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his place.
zh: 比拉死了，波斯拉人謝拉的兒子約巴接續他作王。

en: Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his place.
zh: 約巴死了，來自提幔地的戶珊接續他作王。

en: Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the country of Moab, reigned in his place, the name of his city being Avith.
zh: 戶珊死了，比達的兒子哈達接續他作王；這哈達就是在摩押的田野擊敗了米甸人的，他的京城名叫亞未得。

en: Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his place.
zh: 哈達死了，瑪士利加人桑拉接續他作王。

en: Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth on the Euphrates reigned in his place.
zh: 桑拉死了，來自幼發拉底河旁邊的利河伯的掃羅接續他作王。

en: Shaul died, and Baal-hanan, the son of Achbor, reigned in his place.
zh: 掃羅死了，亞革波的兒子巴勒．哈南接續他作王。

en: Baal-hanan died, and Hadad reigned in his place, the name of his city being Pai; and his wife's name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
zh: 巴勒．哈南死了，哈達接續他作王，他的京城名叫巴伊；他的妻子名叫米希他別，是米．薩合的孫女、瑪特列的女兒。

en: And Hadad died. The chiefs of Edom were: chiefs Timna, Alvah, Jetheth,
zh: 哈達死了，以東人的族長有亭納族長、亞勒瓦族長、耶帖族長、

en: Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,
zh: 阿何利巴瑪族長、以拉族長、比嫩族長、

en: Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,
zh: 基納斯族長、提幔族長、米比薩族長、

en: Magdiel, and Iram; these are the chiefs of Edom.
zh: 瑪基疊族長、以蘭族長，這些人都是以東的族長。
